---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: []
---

## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. -->

## Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- How you'd like it to work. APIs, configuration, examples — whatever helps. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other approaches you've thought about, and why this one is preferred. -->

## Additional context
<!-- Related issues, links, screenshots, or anything else relevant. -->
